message:
feat(fleet): convergence state tracking, incident-scoped quarantine, and action log compaction

Overhaul fleet management to support incident-based quarantine/release
lifecycle with convergence phase tracking and decision receipts:

- fleet_transport.rs: add incident_id to Quarantine/Release actions,
  zone_id to NodeStatus, action log compaction with 30-day retention
  and 10MB threshold, TempFileGuard for safe atomic writes, zone-aware
  node sorting
- main.rs: wire up ConvergencePhase/ConvergenceState/DecisionReceipt
  from fleet_quarantine API, integrate FileFleetTransport for persistent
  fleet state, add fleet incident derivation logic that excludes released
  incidents, expand fleet command tests with multi-incident scenarios
- cli.rs: surface new fleet convergence options in CLI interface
- config.rs: add configuration entries for fleet transport and compaction
- provenance.rs: update supply chain provenance for new fleet schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
